# `idx status` for [filesystem](/commands/categories/filesystem.md)

<div class='command-title'>Show status information for the global in-memory idx runtime.</div>

## Signature

```> idx status {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input   | output |
| ------- | ------ |
| nothing | record |
## Examples

Show the current idx runtime status
```nu
> idx status

```
